n: Prologue, Chapter 2: Skills of an Adventurer

steps.t: You have demonstrated the Guardian's mainstay skill, <rgb=#00ff00>Sting</rgb>, to Tegwyn. Will he relinquish the Uruk's blade to you, as h…
You have demonstrated the core Guardian defensive skill, <rgb=#00ff00>Guardian's Ward</rgb>. Will Tegwyn relinquish the Uruk's blade to yo…
You have fulfilled your end of the bargain. Will Tegwyn relinquish the Uruk's blade to you, as he agreed?
Meneldir is by the east gate of Mossward. Now that you have recovered the Uruk blade, you should bring it to Meneldir.
